description: Loaded-save pad UX: a loaded game starts at the whole-board overview (~0.3 zoom); pressing LB to cycle units now FRAMES the selected unit at a readable zoom (>= 0.5) instead of panning the overview. The board/movement hint bar advertises 'LT/RT Zoom'. Text inputs (the unit-list filter) are demoted out of the pad focus chain (FOCUS_CLICK) so D-pad navigation can never silently land in a text box and kill the camera keys, and pad trigger zoom keeps working even when a text box IS focused. The gold PadFocusRing is visible over whatever control pad focus lands on.

steps.script:
var fo = tree.root.get_viewport().gui_get_focus_owner()
return fo != null and not (fo is LineEdit) and not (fo is TextEdit)
